violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. PIC states it is in process. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025
Handsink in kitchen was observed draining slowly after use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Once food safety manager certificate is obtained, establishment to enroll Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license. Application provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

The fanguard under the kitchen hood area has an accumulation of soil residue and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Once food safety manager certificate is obtained, establishment to enroll Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Cold Holding Unit was observed at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit to be properly adjusted/ repaired/ replaced. No TCS foods to be stored in unit until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees fahrenheit or below. Establishment to use other cold holding unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment shall register a ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (RI license). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. -Staff provided soap during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Establishment shall register a ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (RI license). -Application provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) observed with food residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the can opener during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023

The 2 door Traulsen freezer observed at 40 degrees F. Foods are no longer frozen , but observed at 38-40 degrees F. -Service was contacted. Establishment has no other working freezer in the facility therefore, establishment will transport all TCS foods from the freezer to Middletown High School until freezer has been serviced. -Establishment shall not store TCS foods in the freezer until it can consistently maintain an ambient temperature of 41 degrees F. or below. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023
